projectDescription: A multi-agent orchestrator built with the Botpress ADK that routes chat conversations to specialist AI agents (HR, IT, Sales, Finance, Docs) and escalates to human support via a HITL flow.
keyFeatures: Orchestrator-worker multi-agent pattern with isolated execute() loops per specialist
Five built-in domain specialists: HR, IT, Sales, Finance, and Docs
Human-in-the-loop (HITL) escalation that pauses AI and routes to human support
Resume keywords to hand conversation back to the bot after HITL
RAG knowledge base via Botpress documentation for the Docs agent
needsInput/questions flow for multi-turn clarification without direct user contact
Real-time step tracing UI messages during subagent execution
Webchat and chat channel support via Botpress integrations
publicApiSurface: SubAgent.asTool(execute, step) — wraps a subagent as an Autonomous.Tool
SubAgent.run(input, execute, step) — runs the subagent in isolated worker mode
SubAgentConfig type — configuration shape for defining a SubAgent
SubAgentOutputSchema — z.object({ success, result, data?, needsInput?, questions? })
SubAgentExit — Autonomous.Exit used by all subagents to return results
hrAgent, itAgent, salesAgent, financeAgent, docsAgent — src/agents/index.ts
WebsiteKB — Knowledge base for Botpress docs (src/knowledge/botpress-docs.ts)
